title: Digest: run-plan-implementation
description:
- Verify Batch2 is ready for implementation
- Verify implementation beads already exist
- Create or correct missing implementation beads
- Discover the working team for Batch2
- Assign ready beads to pod coders
- Monitor implementation commits and review coverage
- Audit for stubs, mocks, wiring gaps, and unplanned compatibility behavior
- Create and assign follow-up beads for bugs or review findings
- Drive all implementation and follow-up beads to completion
- Run plan-work-completion-signoff for Batch2
- Run end-to-end wiring review
- Run the validation harness
